html:
For the Event chests containing skins, see Treasury.

ChestBurnt Chest

“A container with 9 slots.”

-

A Chest is a storage Structure. It requires 3 Boards to build and a Science Machine to prototype. It has 9 storage slots. Items can be stored in a Chest by dragging them onto it or by opening the Chest to place them in specific slots. Chests help keep items better organized than by dropping them on the ground. Animals also cannot eat Food kept in Chests except for Splumonkeys, who can knock items out of them as well as Bearger. Also, Krampus is able to break Chests in order to steal the items inside.

Backpacks, Piggybacks, and Krampus Sacks cannot be stored in Chests, even if the containers are empty. However, they can be used as an alternative storage space if for some reason the player is unable to craft a Chest.

Chests are occasionally found pre-built in the world. These are natural Set Pieces and they may contain traps set by Maxwell, causing various effects such as:

  • Spontaneous combustion (character and surrounding objects burst into flames).
  • Summer or Winter suddenly occurs.
  • All food in the player's inventory immediately Spoil.

A Conspicuous Chest can be found in the World. It is a skinned Chest that contains a Terrarium and some resources inside.

During Summer, Chests, as with many structures, can spontaneously combust. A smoking effect will appear, in which time the player must either extinguish the smoldering. Using one's hands causes damage. If this is not done in time, the object will combust and burn. The alternative way to solve this is by using a Scaled Chest.

Usage

Tall Chest

Exclusive to:
This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift

A Chest can be upgraded into a Tall Chest if combined with an Elastispacer. Tall Chests also have 9 storage slots but without a stack limit. It will show "999+" when it contains more than 999 items. For items that exceed stack limits, they can only be taken out as one max stack at a time.

The Tall Chest can be differentiated from a regular Chest by its elongated model, as well as a golden frame in the UI design of the inventory.

Collapsed Chest

If a Tall Chest that contains a large number of items is destroyed, then instead of items falling out, a broken version of it will appear in its place, along with some of items. The player can pick on the Collapsed Chest to get one stack of the items at time, or you can repair it with the materials of a Chest plus a Enlightened Shard, in which case the chest will be restored with all the resources inside.

When a boat with a Tall Chest is destroyed, it will only leave some part of the items but no Collapsed Chest, meaning that the player will lose the rest of items forever.

The Collapsed Chest is not burnable.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

Chest

  • The Woven - Elegant Brute Case skin was introduced during the official Hallowed Nights event in 2018.
  • The Timeless Lovely Chest skin was originally awarded for playing Don't Starve Together during the official Year of the Beefalo event in 2021. As of January 27, 2022, the Loyal version of this skin was available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei Points.
  • The Timeless Ancient King's Chest skin is awarded for solving the Metheus Puzzles, along with the Ancient Cane.
  • The Proof of Purchase Calico Chester Chest skin is obtained by purchasing the Calico Chester from the Klei Store.
  • The Event (Limited-Time Use) Gingerbread Chest skin does not drop normally. Instead, it is usable by everyone during the official Winter's Feast event.
  • The Woven - Distinguished Corrupted Chest and Crimson Chest skin was introduced in the An Eye for An Eye update in 2021, as a crossover collaboration with Re-Logic's Terraria. Its rarity was Inspired - Distinguished initially, but received change in August 19, 2022.
  • The Loyal Celebratory Cake Chest was given out to everyone in honor of the decade of Don't Starve from April 27, 2023.
  • The Woven - Elegant The Lamb's Reward and Woven - Distinguished Flock's Chest skin was introduced in the Cult of the Lamb Crossover update in 2023, as a crossover collaboration with Cult of the Lamb. Collection: Flock's Collection
  • The Proof of Purchase Clockmaker's Chest skin is obtained by purchasing the Wanda Bandai Firelink Don't Starve.

Trivia

  • The Tall Chest was introduced in the Scrappy Scavengers update.
  • Despite the fact that it is believed that tall chests can contain an infinite number of items in one cell. In fact, the number of items in a cell can be a maximum of 4,294,967,296.

ChestBurnt Chest
“It's a tickle trunk!”
–Wilson
“It's a trunk for my junk.”
–Willow
“I put stuff there!”
–Wolfgang
“For which to contain my lucre.”
–Wendy
“EXTERNAL STORAGE UNIT”
–WX-78
“A storage chest.”
–Wickerbottom
“Wood is so handy! Look at all the things you can make!”
–Woodie
“A place to store loot.”
–Maxwell
“A place tö störe my helm and spear whilst I rest.”
–Wigfrid
“We could keep our toys in it!”
–Webber
“Treasure!”
–Warly
“Stuff!”
–Wormwood
“Handmade, so you know it's not up to snuff.”
–Winona
“A storage place for bits and bobs.”
–Wortox
“Oooooh, box for things!”
–Wurt
“It isn't a toy chest, it's a very grownup SUPPLY chest.”
–Walter
“Less cluttering up my pockets means less cluttering up my mind.”
–Wanda
“That trunk was truncated.”
–Wilson
“The trunk burned nicely.”
–Willow
“Nothing will stay inside.”
–Wolfgang
“It couldn't even hold ashes.”
–Wendy
“STORAGE SIZE REDUCED TO ZERO”
–WX-78
“The charred skeleton of a storage chest.”
–Wickerbottom
“I guess wood does have a downside...”
–Woodie
“It won't store anything now.”
–Maxwell
“Its walls were törn döwn by fire.”
–Wigfrid
“It won't be very useful to us now.”
–Webber
“Its treasure-chesting days are over.”
–Warly
“(sigh)”
–Wormwood
“Hope there was nothin' good inside.”
–Winona
“Oh no, our treasure!”
–Wortox
“Noooo!”
–Wurt
“My stuff!!”
–Walter
“I probably should have seen that coming.”
–Wanda
“A container with 9 slots.”
-

“It's been sizably improved.”
–Wilson
“A big trunk for all my junk.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang could store whole gym inside!”
–Wolfgang
“It's still not big enough to hold all my regrets.”
–Wendy
“ENHANCED EXTERNAL STORAGE UNIT”
–WX-78
“A large storage chest.”
–Wickerbottom
“Lots of storage, made of quality wood, what more could you ask for?”
–Woodie
“A place to store lots of loot.”
–Maxwell
“Enöugh röom tö störe an entire armöry!”
–Wigfrid
“Think of all the toys we could fit in there!”
–Webber
“The real treasure is the extra storage space.”
–Warly
“More stuff!”
–Wormwood
“It's new and improved.”
–Winona
“There's room to spare for things in there.”
–Wortox
“Big box for things!”
–Wurt
“Just look at how many important survival supplies it can hold!”
–Walter
“I can always use more space for trinkets.”
–Wanda
A Chest can be upgraded into a Tall Chest if combined with an Elastispacer. Tall Chests also have 9 storage slots but without a stack limit. It will show "999+" when it contains more than 999 items. For items that exceed stack limits, they can only be taken out as one max stack at a time.
The Tall Chest can be differentiated from a regular Chest by its elongated model, as well as a golden frame in the UI design of the inventory.

"collapsed_treasurechest"
“The laws of physics have been bent and broken.”
–Wilson
“Nice, free stuff!”
–Willow
“Poor trunk. Maybe ate too much.”
–Wolfgang
“Is the emptyness all around us now?”
–Wendy
“FLESHSACKS CANNOT HAVE NICE THINGS”
–WX-78
“It would be prudent to rebuild the chest, rather than leave all this lying about.”
–Wickerbottom
“Nobody's blamin' you, Luce.”
–Woodie
“Do you really expect me to dig through that?”
–Maxwell
“Whö hath rendered a shambles öf öur böoty?”
–Wigfrid
“Can we dig for treasure?”
–Webber
“I'm tired of the whole "deconstructed" trend.”
–Warly
“Box ouchie?”
–Wormwood
“Yeesh, what a mess!”
–Winona
“Infinite space, gone without a trace?”
–Wortox
“Didn't do it!!”
–Wurt
“It looks pretty messed-up... but I think I could fix it!”
–Walter
“It's a waste of time to repair if someone's just going to destroy it again.”
–Wanda
If a Tall Chest that contains a large number of items is destroyed, then instead of items falling out, a broken version of it will appear in its place, along with some of items. The player can pick on the Collapsed Chest to get one stack of the items at time, or you can repair it with the materials of a Chest plus a Enlightened Shard, in which case the chest will be restored with all the resources inside.
When a boat with a Tall Chest is destroyed, it will only leave some part of the items but no Collapsed Chest, meaning that the player will lose the rest of items forever.
The Collapsed Chest is not burnable.
Skins[edit | edit source]
Main article: Belongings
Chest[edit | edit source]
The Woven - Elegant Brute Case skin was introduced during the official Hallowed Nights event in 2018.
The Timeless Lovely Chest skin was originally awarded for playing Don't Starve Together during the official Year of the Beefalo event in 2021. As of January 27, 2022, the Loyal version of this skin was available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei Points.
The Timeless Ancient King's Chest skin is awarded for solving the Metheus Puzzles, along with the Ancient Cane.
The Proof of Purchase Calico Chester Chest skin is obtained by purchasing the Calico Chester from the Klei Store.
The Event (Limited-Time Use) Gingerbread Chest skin does not drop normally. Instead, it is usable by everyone during the official Winter's Feast event.
The Woven - Distinguished Corrupted Chest and Crimson Chest skin was introduced in the An Eye for An Eye update in 2021, as a crossover collaboration with Re-Logic's Terraria. Its rarity was Inspired - Distinguished initially, but received change in August 19, 2022.
The Loyal Celebratory Cake Chest was given out to everyone in honor of the decade of Don't Starve from April 27, 2023.
The Woven - Elegant The Lamb's Reward and Woven - Distinguished Flock's Chest skin was introduced in the Cult of the Lamb Crossover update in 2023, as a crossover collaboration with Cult of the Lamb. Collection: Flock's Collection
The Proof of Purchase Clockmaker's Chest skin is obtained by purchasing the Wanda Bandai Firelink Don't Starve.

It requires 3 [[Boards]] to build and a [[Science Machine]] to prototype. It has 9 storage slots. [[Items]] can be stored in a Chest by dragging them onto it or by opening the Chest to place them in specific slots. Chests help keep items better organized than by dropping them on the ground. [[Animals]] also cannot eat [[Food]] kept in Chests except for [[Splumonkey]]s, who can knock items out of them as well as Bearger. Also, [[Krampus]] is able to break Chests in order to steal the items inside. [[Backpack]]s, [[Piggyback]]s, and [[Krampus Sack]]s cannot be stored in Chests, even if the containers are empty. However, they can be used as an alternative storage space if for some reason the player is unable to craft a Chest. Chests are occasionally found pre-built in the [[world]]. These are natural [[Set Pieces]] and they may contain traps set by [[Maxwell (NPC)|Maxwell]], causing various effects such as: *Spontaneous [[Fire|combustion]] ([[character]] and surrounding objects burst into flames). *[[Summer]] or [[Winter]] suddenly occurs. *All food in the player's inventory immediately [[Rot|Spoil]]. A [[Conspicuous Chest]] can be found in the World. It is a skinned Chest that contains a [[Terrarium]] and some resources inside. During [[Summer]], Chests, as with many structures, can spontaneously combust. A smoking effect will appear, in which time the player must either extinguish the smoldering. Using one's hands causes damage. If this is not done in time, the object will combust and burn. The alternative way to solve this is by using a [[Scaled Chest]]. == {{Pic32|Icon Tools}} Usage == {{Recipe |item1 = Chest |tool = Elastispacer |result = Tall Chest}} {{clear}} ==Tall Chest== {{Object Infobox |image= Tall Chest Closed.png|Closed Tall Chest Opened.png|Opened |name = Tall Chest |tool = Can be [[Tools#Hammering Tools|Hammered]] {{pic|24|Hammer}} |canBeBurned = 1 |resources = {{pic|30|Boards}}, Anything contained within |perk = Can hold up to 9 items. The chest no longer has a stack limit |spawnCode="treasurechest_upgraded" }} {{Exclusivity|Don't Starve Together}} {{Rift Content|Lunar Rift}} {{Quotes |wilson = It's been sizably improved. |willow = A big trunk for all my junk. |wolfgang = Wolfgang could store whole gym inside! |wendy = It's still not big enough to hold all my regrets. |wx78 = ENHANCED EXTERNAL STORAGE UNIT |wickerbottom = A large storage chest. |woodie = Lots of storage, made of quality wood, what more could you ask for? |maxwell = A place to store lots of loot. |wigfrid = Enöugh röom tö störe an entire armöry! |webber = Think of all the toys we could fit in there! |winona = It's new and improved. |warly = The real treasure is the extra storage space. |wortox = There's room to spare for things in there. |wormwood = More stuff! |wurt = Big box for things! |walter = Just look at how many important survival supplies it can hold! |wanda = I can always use more space for trinkets. |choose = wilson }} A Chest can be upgraded into a Tall Chest if combined with an [[Elastispacer]]. Tall Chests also have 9 storage slots but without a stack limit. It will show "999+" when it contains more than 999 items. For items that exceed stack limits, they can only be taken out as one max stack at a time. The Tall Chest can be differentiated from a regular Chest by its elongated model, as well as a golden frame in the UI design of the inventory. {{clear}} ===Collapsed Chest=== {{Object Infobox |image = Collapsed_Chest.png |name = Collapsed Chest |picked = Can be picked. |upgrade = {{Pic24|Boards}}x3 {{Pic24|Enlightened Shard}}x1 |spawnCode = "collapsed_treasurechest"}} {{Quotes |wilson = The laws of physics have been bent and broken. |willow = Nice, free stuff! |wolfgang = Poor trunk. Maybe ate too much. |wendy = Is the emptyness all around us now? |wx78 = FLESHSACKS CANNOT HAVE NICE THINGS |wickerbottom = It would be prudent to rebuild the chest, rather than leave all this lying about. |woodie = Nobody's blamin' you, Luce. |maxwell = Do you really expect me to dig through that? |wigfrid = Whö hath rendered a shambles öf öur böoty? |webber = Can we dig for treasure? |winona = Yeesh, what a mess! |warly = I'm tired of the whole "deconstructed" trend. |wortox = Infinite space, gone without a trace? |wormwood = Box ouchie? |wurt = Didn't do it!! |walter = It looks pretty messed-up... but I think I could fix it! |wanda = It's a waste of time to repair if someone's just going to destroy it again. |choose = wilson }} If a Tall Chest that contains a large number of items is destroyed, then instead of items falling out, a broken version of it will appear in its place, along with some of items. The player can pick on the Collapsed Chest to get one stack of the items at time, or you can repair it with the materials of a Chest plus a [[Enlightened Shard]], in which case the chest will be restored with all the resources inside. When a boat with a Tall Chest is destroyed, it will only leave some part of the items but no Collapsed Chest, meaning that the player will lose the rest of items forever. The Collapsed Chest is not burnable. {{clear}} == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Storage_Solutions_Skins|Belongings}} ===Chest=== * The '''Woven - Elegant Brute Case''' skin was introduced during the official [[Hallowed Nights]] event in 2018. * The '''Timeless Lovely Chest''' skin was originally awarded for playing ''Don't Starve Together'' during the official [[Year of the Beefalo]] event in 2021. As of January 27, 2022, the '''Loyal''' version of this skin was available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei Points. * The '''Timeless Ancient King's Chest''' skin is awarded for solving the [[Metheus Puzzles]], along with the Ancient Cane. * The '''Proof of Purchase Calico Chester Chest''' skin is obtained by purchasing the Calico Chester from the [https://shop.klei.com/ Klei Store]. * The '''Event (Limited-Time Use) Gingerbread Chest''' skin does not drop normally. Instead, it is usable by everyone during the official [[Winter's Feast]] event. * The '''Woven - Distinguished Corrupted Chest''' and '''Crimson Chest''' skin was introduced in the ''[[An Eye for An Eye]]'' update in 2021, as a crossover collaboration with Re-Logic's ''Terraria''. Its rarity was '''Inspired - Distinguished''' initially, but received change in August 19, 2022. * The '''Loyal Celebratory Cake Chest''' was given out to everyone in honor of the decade of ''Don't Starve'' from April 27, 2023. * The '''Woven - Elegant The Lamb's Reward''' and '''Woven - Distinguished Flock's Chest''' skin was introduced in the ''[[Cult of the Lamb Crossover]]'' update in 2023, as a crossover collaboration with Cult of the Lamb. Collection: Flock's Collection * The '''Proof of Purchase Clockmaker's Chest''' skin is obtained by purchasing the Wanda Bandai Firelink Don't Starve.
